title: Lab: Repair a Cooling-Center Wayfinding Diagram
summary: Lab: Repair a Cooling-Center Wayfinding Diagram retrieves prior skills in an original unfamiliar containing-block sticky and stacking incident scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css normal flow, css floats, css relative position, css absolute position, css fixed sticky, css stacking contexts in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real unfamiliar containing-block sticky and stacking incident artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

options.text: Unfamiliar containing-block sticky and stacking incident case 1: absolutely position every heading card and action so browser flow cannot affect the design.
Unfamiliar containing-block sticky and stacking incident case 1: build a readable source-ordered flow baseline first and remove an element from flow only for a relationship that flow cannot express.
Unfamiliar containing-block sticky and stacking incident case 1: use fixed heights to reserve space for all content removed from flow.
